MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff UN Prop LLC's Motion To Compel Further Answers To Interrogatories; And For Sanctions is OFF CALENDAR.

Given the notice of settlement of the entire case filed on 12/17/2025, the court orders the instant motion off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
